parameters.query: SELECT bp.id AS prospect_id, bp.client_id, bp.domain, bp.contact_name, bp.contact_email, c.name AS client_name, c.domain AS client_domain FROM backlink_prospects bp JOIN clients c ON bp.client_id = c.id WHERE bp.status = 'new' AND bp.contact_email IS NOT NULL AND c.status = 'active' ORDER BY bp.domain_authority DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50
SELECT properties FROM integrations WHERE provider = 'smtp-email' AND is_active = true LIMIT 1
=UPDATE backlink_prospects SET status = 'contacted', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{$json.prospect_id}}'

=INSERT INTO outreach_messages (prospect_id, channel, subject, body, status, sent_at) VALUES ('{{$json.prospect_id}}', 'email', '{{$json.subject}}', '{{$json.body.substring(0, 500)}}', 'sent', NOW()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

=INSERT INTO agent_action_log (client_id, module, action_type, summary, status, triggered_by, created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', 'outreach', 'email_sent', 'Outreach email sent to {{$json.contact_name}} at {{$json.domain}}', 'success', 'n8n-outreach-runner', NOW())
